institution.name: University of Arkansas Community College Rich Mountain

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Arkansas Community College Rich Mountain are 12% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($30.0k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Arkansas Community College Rich Mountain fell 37% between 2007 and 2010 (25.0% → 15.7%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas Community College Rich Mountain fell 36% between 2009 and 2010 (13.6% → 8.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas Community College Rich Mountain rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.7k).
